members.name: path
members.description: The asset path to the video file.

members.name: localPath
members.description: The resolved local filesystem path to the video file.

members.name: subtitles
members.description: List of subtitle entries parsed from the .srt file.

members.name: curSubtitle
members.description: Index of the currently active subtitle.

functions.name: new
functions.description: Creates a new video cutscene from the given asset path.

functions.name: parseSubtitles
functions.description: Parses a .srt subtitle file matching the video path and populates the subtitles array.

functions.name: splitTime
functions.description: Parses an SRT timestamp string (e.g. 00:01:23,456) into seconds.

functions.name: onReady
functions.description: Called when the video has finished loading. Fades out the loading bar and starts playback.

functions.name: setSubtitle
functions.description: Updates the subtitle text and background visibility.

functions.name: onResumeCutscene
functions.description: Resumes video playback after the pause menu is closed.

functions.name: onRestartCutscene
functions.description: Restarts the video from the beginning and resets subtitles.

functions.name: destroy
functions.description: Removes the cutscene camera and destroys the video sprite.
